summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KOLOR STUDIO landing page redesign. All 6 sections verified: Hero (gradient background, headline, CTAs), Problem (3 pain point cards), Solution (4 feature cards with colored tags), How It Works (3 numbered steps with colored circles and progress line), Pricing (3 tiers with Pro having gradient and BETA SPECIAL badge), and Final CTA (gradient background). All navigation links work correctly and mobile responsiveness verified at 390px viewport.
passed_tests: Landing page container renders with data-testid='landing-page'
Navigation bar renders with KOLOR STUDIO logo
Login link visible and points to /login
Get Started nav button points to /signup
Hero section has bg-gradient-hero background
Hero headline 'Your CRM Should Work Harder Than You Do' displays correctly
Hero primary CTA (Start Free Trial) links to /signup
Hero secondary CTA (See How It Works) links to #how-it-works
Problem section renders with 3 pain point cards
Pain card: 'Chasing Payments' visible with icon
Pain card: 'Endless Follow-Ups' visible with icon
Pain card: 'Spreadsheet Hell' visible with icon
Solution section renders with 4 feature cards
Feature: 'Instant Professional Quotes' visible with colored tags
Feature: 'Digital Contracts That Sign Themselves' visible
Feature: 'Payments on Autopilot' visible
Feature: 'Client Portals They'll Love' visible
How It Works section has id='how-it-works' for anchor navigation
Step 1: 'Create Quote' visible with purple circle
Step 2: 'Autopilot Takes Over' visible with cyan circle
Step 3: 'Get Paid, Start Creating' visible with green circle
Pricing section renders with 3 tiers
Free tier ($0) visible with CTA linking to /signup
Pro tier ($29) has gradient background (bg-gradient-brand)
Pro tier displays BETA SPECIAL badge
Pro tier CTA links to /signup
Studio tier ($79) visible with CTA linking to /signup
Final CTA section has bg-gradient-hero gradient background
Final CTA headline 'Stop Chasing. Start Creating.' visible
Final CTA button links to /signup
Footer renders properly
'See How It Works' button smooth scrolls to #how-it-works section
Login link navigates to /login page
Get Started nav button navigates to /signup page
Hero primary CTA navigates to /signup page
Mobile (390px): Hero section renders properly
Mobile: Hero headline visible
Mobile: Both CTA buttons visible and stacked vertically
Mobile: Pain cards stack properly in single column
Mobile: Feature cards stack properly in single column
Mobile: How It Works steps stack properly
Mobile: Pricing cards stack properly
Mobile: Final CTA section and button visible
Mobile: Footer renders properly
critical_code_review_comments: Landing page implementation follows design system properly using Tailwind custom classes (bg-gradient-hero, bg-gradient-brand, etc.)
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for robust testing
Framer Motion animations work correctly without breaking functionality
Responsive design properly implemented with sm/md breakpoints
All CTA links correctly point to /signup or appropriate anchors
Phosphor icons properly imported and displayed
Progress line in How It Works section uses bg-gradient-creative
seed_data_creation: No seed data required - public landing page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page redesign is complete and fully functional. All 6 sections verified: Hero, Problem, Solution, How It Works, Pricing, Final CTA. All CTAs link to /signup. Smooth scroll works for #how-it-works anchor. Mobile responsiveness verified at 390px. Cookie consent banner present but doesn't block functionality.

hero.headline: Your CRM Should Work Harder Than You Do
